mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maummcc.LEARNING_MODEL (LEARNING_ID, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, LEARN_NAME, RESULT_CODE, RESULT_MSG, CREATE_DTM, HDQR_BOB_DCD, EPOCH, LEARNING_RATE, BATCH_SIZE) VALUES (#{learningId}, #{regId}, current_timestamp(), #{modId}, current_timestamp(), #{learnName}, '0', 'SUCCESS', current_timestamp(), #{hdqrBobDcd}, #{epoch}, #{learningRate}, #{batchSize});
mapper.select: select ID, LEARNING_ID, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, LEARN_NAME, RESULT_CODE, RESULT_MSG, CREATE_DTM, HDQR_BOB_DCD from LEARNING_MODEL where ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE maummcc.LEARNING_MODEL SET FILE_PATH = #{filePath}, FILE_NAME = #{fileName}, EPOCH = #{epoch}, LEARNING_RATE = #{learningRate}, BATCH_SIZE = #{batchSize} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
select lm.ID, lm.LEARNING_ID, lm.REG_ID, lm.REG_DT, lm.MOD_ID, lm.MOD_DT, lm.LEARN_NAME, lm.RESULT_CODE, lm.RESULT_MSG, lm.CREATE_DTM, lm.EPOCH, lm.LEARNING_RATE, lm.BATCH_SIZE, lm.DEPLOY_DT, lm.ROLLBACK_DT, lm.LEARNING_RESULT, lm.DEPLOY_STATUS, hm.MEM_NAME as REG_NAME from LEARNING_MODEL lm inner join HC_MEMBER hm on lm.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID
ORDER BY CREATE_DTM
ASC
DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) from LEARNING_MODEL lm inner join HC_MEMBER hm on lm.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID
